title: Time-multiplexed successive approximation register (sar) analog-to-digital converter (adc) circuits for multi-channel receivers
abstract: Certain aspects of the present disclosure provide multi-channel receiver circuits implemented with time-multiplexed successive approximation register (SAR) analog-to-digital converter (ADC) circuits and methods for operating such receiver circuits. One example receiver circuit generally includes a first multiplexer having a plurality of inputs coupled to a plurality of in-phase (I) receive paths associated with different channels of the receiver circuit, a first SAR ADC circuit having an input coupled to an output of the first multiplexer, a second multiplexer having a plurality of inputs coupled to a plurality of quadrature (Q) receive paths associated with the different channels of the receiver circuit, and a second SAR ADC circuit having an input coupled to an output of the second multiplexer.
